alert.name: Policy V2 7770002: Sysdig Runtime Notable Events
alert.description: This Notable Events policy contains rules which may indicate undesired behavior including security threats. The rules are more generalized than Threat Detection policies and may result in more noise. Tuning will likely be required for the events generated from this policy.
alert.subject: Sysdig Runtime Notable Events triggered at 04/28/2026 01:13 PM UTC
